NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTION FILED BY PETITIONER CHANG, SUK SOM PONG AS TO RESPONDENT CHANG, WILLIAM HEARING SET FOR NOV-27-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PETITIONER SUK SOM PONG CHANG'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. RESPONDENT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
